channel.title: Ai-for-Science on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: When AI Starts Predicting the Next Scientific Question
item.description: AI may not just accelerate science. It may begin to shape which questions emerge first.A new study in Nature Machine Intelligence suggests AI may do more than summarise knowledge or accelerate discove
